title: Polish: reactions, edit/delete indicators, reply-to snippet
description:
## Why
These are visible spec-defined message states the UI must handle even if not fully interactive.

## What
- Reactions: display emoji summary under each message (e.g. '👍 3  ❤️ 1')
- Edit indicator: show [edited] and optionally a hover/tooltip with editedAt time
- Deletion tombstone: show [deleted] for messages with deletedAt set
- Reply-to: when replyTo is set, show a one-line quoted snippet of the referenced message above the body
- No interactive reaction add/remove in this issue (deferred)
close_reason: Superseded; replaced by issues under jmap-chat-tui-s2e (egui) and new TUI epic
